body: Please post the output of `STARSHIP_LOG=trace starship module git_metrics`

Here are the results.

I navigated a bit the folders that starship provided hoping that would help as well debug it.

This will be fixed once the upstream fix is released, and once we make a release that includes it.

It seems that it was fixed upstream a month ago, I don't mean to put any pressure; I am just curious what is the release schedule of starship.

https://github.com/GitoxideLabs/gitoxide/releases/tag/gix-worktree-v0.39.0
I had this problem, and upgrading fixed it. So the issue can be closed afaict.
